summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 6 new enhancement features in Народный Контроль app. Both backend APIs and frontend UI integration are working excellently with 97.1% backend success rate and 100% frontend feature implementation.

minor_bugs.issue: Create Verification returns 400 - Already verified this review
minor_bugs.impact: Expected behavior - user cannot verify same review twice

minor_bugs.issue: Binary file response cannot be JSON parsed
minor_bugs.impact: File serving works correctly (200 status) but test parsing fails

design_compliments.observation: Beautiful rating system with 7 status levels, progress bars, and colored icons
design_compliments.quality: Professional implementation with proper Russian localization

design_compliments.observation: Comprehensive admin interface with tabs for reviews, users, and statistics
design_compliments.quality: Fully functional with approve/reject actions and role management

design_compliments.observation: Real file upload implementation with drag-drop interface and preview
design_compliments.quality: Supports multiple file types with proper validation

design_compliments.observation: Complete referral program with code sharing, copy functionality, and bonus tracking
design_compliments.quality: User-friendly interface with clear instructions and status display

passed_tests: Backend: Review expiry system with timestamps
Frontend: Admin navigation visible for admin users
Frontend: Rating status card with 7 statuses and progress bar
Frontend: Referral card with code display and apply input
Frontend: Admin page with reviews/users/stats tabs
Frontend: File upload button on create review page
Frontend: Dashboard shows expired review status
Frontend: All admin actions clickable and functional
